articles.author: Michelle Basch
articles.title: The heart health steps now recommended you take in your 20s and 30s - WTOP
articles.description: People between ages 20 and 40 should be taking steps now to prevent heart attacks and strokes, according to new recommendations from the American Heart Association.
articles.content:
People between ages 20 and 40 should be taking steps now to prevent heart attacks and strokes, according to new recommendations from the American Heart Association.
